findings.problem: The narration keeps falling into the same clipped-fragment scaffold: short one- to three-word bursts in sequence, often at emotionally important moments. A little of this can sharpen pressure, but here it recurs often enough to read as a mechanical prose tic rather than scene-shaped rhythm. It also pushes against the constitution's ban on elliptical clipping in narration.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the fragment clusters centered on snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:29, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:33, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:65, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:69, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:77, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:79, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:161, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:229, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:239 into more varied sentence shapes. Keep the compression where pressure peaks, but attach most observations to full clauses anchored in Kem's bodily perception instead of stacking reusable sentence shards.
findings.acceptance_test: In the revised text around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:29, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:65, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:159, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:229, the scene still delivers the same physical information, but no major beat relies on consecutive standalone fragment sentences as its default rhythm more than once per scene.

findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly translates its strongest beats into abstract thesis language after the embodied material has already landed. Lines about arithmetic, reality, conviction, cleanliness, and 'the new fact' keep paraphrasing the meaning of the scene instead of trusting the stitches, the subtraction, and Vel's witness-account to carry that meaning themselves. This is thematic underlining rather than added dramatic work.
findings.rewrite_direction: Trim or recast the interpretive summaries at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:79, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:161, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:195, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:221, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:227 so that each paragraph either introduces a new fact, a new bodily consequence, or a changed choice. If a paragraph's only job is to restate what the reader already understood from the prior image or line of dialogue, cut it or convert it into fresh pressure.
findings.acceptance_test: After revision, a cold reader can infer the chapter's key meanings from the stitched arm, the Ledger arithmetic, Vel's crossing memory, and Kem's changed bodily attention without needing abstract paraphrase in the cited spans; each surviving paragraph at those locations contributes new information or a new turn rather than restating theme.

findings.problem: The campfire revelation too often defaults to mirrored question-answer exchange and echoed phrasing. Kem asking real questions is correct for him, and Vel answering narrowly is correct for her, but the repeated ladder of short prompts and near-symmetrical replies makes the scene sound arranged rather than overheard. The revelation's pressure flattens into catechism.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the exchange around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:163, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:167, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:183, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:203, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:215 so that some beats arrive through interruption, deflection, action against dialogue, or asymmetrical replies instead of direct echo. Preserve the same facts about the threshold, the crossing conditions, and the no-Ledger world, but vary the turn-shape.
findings.acceptance_test: In the revised dialogue between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:163 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:217, at least two of the current mirrored echo pairs are replaced by responses that shift leverage or rhythm; the scene still communicates the same key facts, but it no longer reads as repeated call-and-response restatement.

findings.problem: The chapter's emotional state shift depends on Vel making a personally costly disclosure, but the scene renders the mechanics of the crossing more vividly than it renders what this memory costs her. Keeping the person unnamed is fine; keeping the loss nearly generic is not. As written, the chapter deepens world knowledge more decisively than it deepens the relationship, so the shared-vulnerability beat lands a little timidly.
findings.rewrite_direction: Strengthen the personal cost in the passage anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:147, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:155, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:193 without spending the later-book reveal. Add one concrete relational trace, shared-history detail, or unmistakable bodily aftershock that makes this crosser more than 'someone' to Vel, or let Kem's recognition provoke a visible change in her behavior instead of summarizing the meaning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:195.
findings.acceptance_test: A reader of the revised passage from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:147 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_09.md:196 can state not only that Vel once saw a crossing, but why this memory wounds her personally, based on at least one concrete detail or unmistakable pressure trace on the page, even if the lost person remains unnamed.

summary: The chapter keeps continuity straight and gets the embodied aftermath mostly right: Kem's ugly field medicine, the arithmetic of dropping to 178, and the first serious no-Ledger reveal all land. It still fails review because the line-level control is not shortlist-grade. The prose overuses clipped fragment bursts, the narration keeps translating its own meaning after the image or action has already made the point, the fire-side exchange falls into too many mirrored Q-and-A turns, and Vel's disclosure remains slightly under-risked as personal scene material. The chapter is functional and often strong, but it is not yet rigorous enough to pass award, craft, dialogue, or prose on this stage.
